case_title: DARIN SEVERNS et al VS. ROGER TELLIS et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SEVERNS, DARIN HUFFAKER, BILL AS TO DEFENDANT TELLIS, ROGER HANSEN, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
